comment.body:
I’ve never been into or followed any gurus or signals… I mean logically it’s obv rediculous concept somebody would offer a service for less than it’s worth to do themselves… I started following you because it was rare for me to see somebody post intellectually smart enough to really explain Greeks and show proof of concept. 

But, I think about it sometimes maybe because I’m fascinated with history and epics: but it could be compared to the age old tale of the angel who came down to expose all the false gods… and lead their people to truth…

Really is biblical because I know for a fact that this isn’t worth the $ your doing it for and all the hate I see u get sometimes and all the effort you put into even trying to psychologically coach people into not hurting themselves…

It’s rare… I definitely wouldn’t do it. I’m not that kind of a person I guess. 

But I appreciate it.
